title: Device Settings - All settings can be changed
scenario: Verify that all non-toggle device settings options can be changed via picker and updated values are correctly displayed.
steps: Pair the headset and launch the app, go to Device Settings, tap on any non-toggle option.
Repeat for every available option for that device.
expected: 1. Picker is displayed with list of all available values for that option. 2. Picker is closed and option on Device Settings screen is updated with new value. 3. Changes for all options are properly displayed on Device Settings screen.
